summary: A Hawaii anesthesiologist, Gerhardt Konig, has been convicted of attempted manslaughter for trying to kill his wife during a hike last year. The jury returned the verdict after a day of deliberations, finding that Konig acted under extreme mental or emotional disturbance, which carries up to 20 years in prison. Sentencing is set for August 13, and Konig's attorney plans to appeal the conviction.

The New York Times' game Pips, released in August 2025, is a single-player game that puts a unique spin on dominoes. The game has different difficulty levels with color-coded conditions that players must meet to progress. The article provides hints and answers for each difficulty level, including easy, medium, and hard, to help players solve the puzzles.

A former Fort Bragg employee, Courtney P. Williams, 40, has been arrested and charged with unlawfully transmitting national defense information to a journalist. Williams, who held a Top Secret/Sensitive Compartmented Information clearance, allegedly leaked classified military tactics and information to the journalist over several years. The leaked information, which included sensitive operational details, could pose serious risks to military personnel and compromise operations, according to authorities.

Jim Whittaker, the first American to summit Mt. Everest, has died at the age of 97. He reached the summit on May 1, 1963, with Sherpa Nawang Gombu, and his achievement made him a hero, with his picture on the cover of Life magazine and a White House celebration. Whittaker, who was an adventurer throughout his life, passed away at his home in Port Townsend, Washington, leaving behind his wife and children.

Author Frieda McFadden, known for her novel "The Housemaid", has revealed her true identity as Sara Cohen, a 45-year-old New York-born doctor. Cohen had kept her writing career a secret for 23 years, using a pseudonym and disguise to maintain her privacy. She has now scaled back her medical work and is speaking publicly about her dual life as a doctor and author.
